summary: `editingSessionChannel.ts` is added to §14 Purity Boundary Map as 'Effectful (INBOUND only)' but no PROP-FEED-S5-XXX enforces the boundary. The existing PROP-FEED-032 covers `feedStateChannel.ts` invoke-zero-hit and `tauriFeedAdapter.ts` listen-zero-hit; the new module needs the analogous gate.

detail.snippet:
L697 (Sprint 5 Purity Boundary Map): editingSessionChannel.ts (Sprint 5 新規) または feedStateChannel.ts 拡張 | subscribeEditingSessionState(handler): () => void | Effectful (INBOUND only) | Tauri listen ラッパー. dispatch しない (PROP-FEED-S5-007 で boundary audit).

L190 (PROP-FEED-032): IPC boundary audit: grep "listen" src/lib/feed/tauriFeedAdapter.ts ゼロヒット; grep "invoke" src/lib/feed/feedStateChannel.ts ゼロヒット | 0 | grep audit | true | boundary

context: (1) Line 697 cross-references PROP-FEED-S5-007 as the boundary audit. PROP-FEED-S5-007 (line 710) is actually about SaveFailureBanner DOM presence, not IPC boundary. This is a wrong cross-reference. (2) The new INBOUND-only constraint on editingSessionChannel.ts has no grep audit equivalent to PROP-FEED-032. Without it, a developer can add `invoke(...)` to editingSessionChannel.ts (e.g., for an ad-hoc 'fetch current state' call) and break the OUTBOUND/INBOUND separation that the Tier 0 architecture relies on. (3) The Phase 5 hardening gate (line 770) inherits Required PROPs but PROP-FEED-S5-007 wouldn't catch invoke leakage.
recommendedFix: Add: PROP-FEED-S5-021 (or extend PROP-FEED-032): `grep -nE 'invoke\(' promptnotes/src/lib/feed/editingSessionChannel.ts` — 0 hits; `grep -nE '@tauri-apps/api/core' promptnotes/src/lib/feed/editingSessionChannel.ts` — 0 hits. Mark Required: true, Tier 0, grep audit. Also fix the cross-reference at line 697 from 'PROP-FEED-S5-007' to the new boundary PROP.
